data.name: Ultimate Sugar Crush! — Brick Breaker Desire
data.detailed_description:
一款與 Sugar Conflict 合作打造的誘惑系打磚幻想遊戲！

在 Ultimate Sugar Crush! — Brick Breaker Desire 中，每打破一塊方塊，就更接近揭開甜點女孩們隱藏的祕密。
隨著繽紛的糖果方塊逐漸碎裂，那些被遮掩的動態畫面也慢慢顯露出她們無法抗拒的魅力——這是對每一擊準確操作的甜美獎勵。每個關卡都是破壞與誘惑之間的遊戲，讓甜蜜逐步融化成迷人的吸引力。

遊戲特色

  • 誘人的甜點女孩：可愛又魅惑的甜點系少女登場，每位角色都有獨特個性與專屬動畫，等你親手揭開。

  • 爽快的打磚快感：連擊與爆鏈的刺激節奏，讓甜蜜一層層被揭開，挑逗你的好奇心。

  • 特色技能系統：分身、穿透、射擊等技能，讓策略與誘惑完美融合。

  • 無限重玩性：方塊配置隨機變化，每次挑戰都帶來全新體驗。

  • 甜美而迷人的美術風格：融合可愛與性感的日系畫風，打造既治癒又心動的世界。

data.short_description: Ultimate Sugar Crush! — Brick Breaker Desire 一款可愛又充滿魅力的打磚遊戲，甜點女孩將陪伴你一路前行。打破方塊，揭開她們迷人的畫面，享受清新又令人心跳的體驗吧！
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 4th Gen or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics supporting DirectX 10 (e.g. HD 4000)
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Standard audio device
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 or AMD Ryzen 5 or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Standard audio device

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 11 (Big Sur)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 (Quad Core) or Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Metal capable GPU (Intel HD Graphics 4000 or better / Apple Silicon GPU)
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Standard audio device
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 13 (Ventura) or later
  • 處理器: Apple M1 / M2 / M3, or Intel Core i7
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Apple Silicon GPU / AMD Radeon Pro or better
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Standard audio device

data.name: Ultimate Sugar Crush! — Brick Breaker Desire
data.detailed_description:
A seductive brick-breaking fantasy in collaboration with Sugar Conflict!

In Ultimate Sugar Crush! — Brick Breaker Desire, every block you break brings you closer to uncovering the sweet secret behind each dessert girl.
As the layers of candy-colored tiles shatter away, the once-hidden animations begin to reveal their irresistible charm — a visual treat that rewards your every skillful move.

Each stage is a playful dance between destruction and temptation, where sweetness slowly melts into allure.

Features

  • Tempting Dessert Girls: Meet a cast of adorable, dessert-inspired heroines — each with her own unique charm, personality, and seductive animations waiting to be revealed.

  • Addictive Brick-Breaking Pleasure: Feel the rush of combos and chain reactions as every hit peels back another layer of sweetness, teasing what lies beneath.

  • Special Skills with a Twist: Master unique abilities such as Clone Split, Piercing Shot, and Sweet Blaster — tools that turn every stage into a thrilling mix of strategy and seduction.

  • Endless Replayability: With randomized block patterns and hidden visuals to uncover, no two rounds will ever feel the same.

  • A Sweetly Alluring Art Style: Adorable Japanese-inspired visuals that blend cuteness with a hint of sensuality — inviting you into a world as charming as it is tempting.

data.short_description: Ultimate Sugar Crush! — Brick Breaker Desire — A sweet and charming brick-breaking game where dessert girls accompany you through every stage. Break the blocks to reveal delightful visuals and enjoy a cute, refreshing experience.
data.supported_languages:
English, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
*languages with full audio support
